disclaimer: For nursing training and supervision only. Do NOT use as medical diagnosis. Final review must be completed by a supervisor or registered nurse.

shoulder_hip_alignment.detail: Excellent - shoulder and hip lines parallel

pressure_area_protection.detail: Excellent - heels and ankles properly positioned

ai_observation: The patient is clearly positioned in a proper side-lying posture, meeting the clinical standard for lateral body rotation. Shoulder-hip alignment is good with no significant axial spinal twist detected. Head and neck positioning is adequate, indicating appropriate pillow height. Lateral spinal curvature is detected. Additional back support (wedge pillow) is recommended to maintain alignment. Leg separation is adequate, reducing contact pressure between medial knee condyles and malleoli. Heel and ankle positioning appears satisfactory with no evident direct surface compression.
improvement_suggestions: Place a firm wedge or folded pillow along the patient's back to maintain spinal alignment and prevent rolling back to supine.
